global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract shapes and text elements promoting a service.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Small rounded shape
elements.description: A small, rounded shape in the center, with a light blue hue.

elements.label: Secondary icon
